summary: Add authentication gate to HSPT Tutor app requiring login and permission check
implementation:
1. apps/web/app/apps/hspt-tutor/layout.tsx: Import React and requireAppLayoutAccess from '@/lib/require-app-layout-access'. Make HsptTutorLayout async. Add 'await requireAppLayoutAccess("hspt-tutor")' as first line of function body.
2. apps/web/lib/app-registry.ts: Change hspt-tutor entry from auth: false to auth: true.
3. apps/web/app/apps/hspt-tutor/__tests__/layout.test.tsx: Create test file following hspt-practice test pattern — mock requireAppLayoutAccess, test it's called with 'hspt-tutor', test unauthenticated redirect to /login, test unauthorized redirect to /unauthorized, test authenticated user renders children.

testing.reason: Auth gate changes app behavior — unauthenticated/unauthorized users get redirected. Smoke tests verify the guard is wired correctly.

verification.reason: Auth gate logic is tested via unit tests mocking requireAppLayoutAccess. Browser verification would require auth credentials and session setup not suitable for automated playwright checks.
